name: Bismarck Parks And Recreation
description: Bismarck Parks And Recreation is a place to play pickleball in Bismarck, ND. There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Capital Racquet & Fitness Center
description: Capital Racquet & Fitness Center is a place to play pickleball in Bismarck, ND. There are 8 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Elk Ridge Park
description: Elk Ridge Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Bismarck, ND. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.

name: Horizon Park
description: Horizon Park is a place to play pickleball in Bismarck, ND. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.
